stem: Line p intersects line q. Based on the figure, the angle marked x° and the angle marked 118° are vertical angles. Which of the following must be true about the value of x?

answerOptions.content: The value of x is equal to 118.
The value of x is less than 118.
The value of x is greater than 118.
The value of x cannot be determined.

rationale: Choice A is correct. Vertical angles formed by two intersecting lines are congruent, so x = 118.
